summary: Attacker forged a cross-chain message updating the EthCrossChainData keeper to their own address, then signed arbitrary withdrawals against three chains.
attack_trace: Submit crafted putCurEpochConPubKeyBytes call via verifyHeaderAndExecuteTx
Replace keeper pubkey with attacker-controlled key
Sign withdrawal messages, drain pools on Ethereum/BSC/Polygon
root_cause: EthCrossChainManager forwarded calls to EthCrossChainData using msg.sender = manager, allowing the keeper to be reassigned without validation.
